seo.title: YumiScan — Scan Japanese labels and detect your allergens
seo.description: YumiScan detects allergens in your products using AI. Scan Japanese labels, identify gluten, soy, eggs, shellfish and more. 3 free scans on signup.

json_ld.website_desc: Detect allergens in your products with AI.
json_ld.item_list_desc: Japan travel tips, food allergies and labels.
json_ld.faq_q1: How does AI allergen detection work?
json_ld.faq_a1: YumiScan uses an OCR + multi-step artificial intelligence pipeline: the image is analyzed, text is extracted, and each ingredient is classified against your customized allergen criteria.
json_ld.faq_a2: All major allergens: gluten, soy, eggs, shellfish, peanuts, tree nuts, sesame, milk, fish, and many more. You can also add custom criteria like halal or vegan.
json_ld.faq_q3: Does the scan work with Japanese labels?
json_ld.faq_a3: Yes, that's our specialty. The AI is optimized to read complex food kanjis and automatically translate Japanese ingredient lists into your language.
json_ld.faq_q4: How many free scans are included?
json_ld.faq_a4: Upon account creation, you get 3 free scans to test the full experience with no commitment.
json_ld.faq_a5: No. Your credits are valid for life, with no time limit. Use them at your own pace.
json_ld.faq_q6: What types of food products can I scan?
json_ld.faq_a6: All packaged products with a readable ingredient list: snacks, ready meals, sauces, drinks, confectioneries, dairy products, etc. The app is particularly effective on Japanese products.
json_ld.faq_a7: The AI achieves a very high level of precision, but we always recommend verifying the packaging when in doubt, especially for severe allergies. YumiScan is a decision-support tool, not a medical diagnosis.
json_ld.faq_a8: The analysis requires an internet connection because it replies on our cloud AI. However, your scan history can be viewed at any time.
json_ld.faq_q9: How is my personal data protected?
json_ld.faq_a9: Your data is hosted securely. Scan images are stored in a private space accessible only by you. Payment is handled by Stripe, which is PCI-DSS certified.
json_ld.faq_a10: Yes. YumiScan is a Progressive Web App (PWA) accessible from any mobile browser. You can install it on your home screen like a native app, without going through an app store.
json_ld.faq_a11: Stripe secure checkout shows the payment methods available for your device and country, such as cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, or Revolut Pay.

intro.description: Photograph the ingredients, the AI detects your allergens in seconds.
intro.disclaimer: Note · AI is an aid, always verify the packaging when in doubt.

list.opt_criteria_desc: Allergens, diets, additives: decode lists at a glance.
list.opt_alerte_desc: Detects traces of soy, eggs, crustaceans, etc.

cta_banner.title: View my scan history
cta_banner.desc: Access your latest scans and results.

fb.quote: I scan every product at the konbini, in 3 seconds I know if it's safe for me. A real time saver.
fb.author: Fatima B.

ym.quote: Impossible to read Japanese labels, the app translates for me and tells me exactly what to avoid.
ym.author: Youssef M.

cd.quote: Since I started using YumiScan, I'm no longer afraid to try new products, the scan immediately reassures me.
cd.author: Camille D.

ka.quote: The app saved me more than once at the supermarket. The detection is super accurate, highly recommended.
ka.author: Karim A.

trust.title: Secure Stripe payment
trust.desc: One-time payment, no subscription. Data protected.
